description: User dwells on the Webjet homepage, likely reviewing the pre-filled flight search details or the initial hero image.
frame_description: The homepage shows a flight search widget over a hero image of rice terraces.

description: The hero image on the homepage automatically transitions from the rice terraces image to an image of the Eiffel Tower.
frame_description: The background image behind the search widget changes to the Eiffel Tower.

description: User moves the cursor slowly towards the top navigation bar and browser tabs without performing an action, suggesting uncertainty or preparation for a new navigation.
frame_description: The cursor drifts upwards from the center of the screen towards the top menu.
